dispatch_policy: Single project-level character-board addition. Prefer direct parent image generation; if moved to background execution, use one Codex thread with the exact output path below.

jobs.thread_title: 断航故土 厉螳多状态角色板 v01
jobs.worker_instruction: Use the image prompt exactly, preserve the locked Suming/Qingming emblem as a small physical plaque or seal only, do not redesign badges, generate the raster character board, save the final PNG to the expected output path, archive retained intermediates in assets/characters/history with .v001 suffixes if any, then return a compact manifest.
